title: Add bank information storage and phone-based order pickup

requirements.text: Add a backend data structure to store bank account information including account holder name, bank name, account number, and routing number

quotes: Implement a place where I can put my bank information so I can receive funds to my account when customers place order

acceptanceCriteria: Backend maintains a single bank account record with fields for account holder name, bank name, account number, and routing number
Bank information can be updated and retrieved through backend methods

requirements.text: Create an admin page with a form to enter and update bank account information for receiving customer payments

quotes: Implement a place where I can put my bank information so I can receive funds to my account

acceptanceCriteria: Admin interface includes input fields for account holder name, bank name, account number, and routing number
Form allows saving and updating bank information
Displays current bank information when available
Shows success confirmation after saving bank details

requirements.text: Add navigation link to the bank information admin page in the header navigation
acceptanceCriteria: Navigation includes a link to access the bank information page
Link is accessible from the main header navigation

requirements.text: Modify the Order data structure in the backend to include a customer phone number field

quotes: I want customers to make orders by using their phone number

acceptanceCriteria: Order record includes a phone number field
Phone number is persisted when orders are created

requirements.text: Add a phone number input field to the checkout form that captures the customer's phone number during order placement

quotes: I want customers to make orders by using their phone number

acceptanceCriteria: Checkout form includes a phone number input field
Phone number is required to complete checkout
Phone number is submitted with the order

requirements.text: Display the customer's phone number in the order confirmation view shown to customers after purchase

quotes: it would give their phone number whenever you're picking up their order

acceptanceCriteria: Order confirmation page displays the customer's phone number
Phone number is clearly visible for pickup reference

requirements.text: Display the customer's phone number in the admin order management interface for each order to identify customers during pickup

quotes: it would give their phone number whenever you're picking up their order

acceptanceCriteria: Order management page shows customer phone number for each order
Phone number is prominently displayed alongside other order details
Phone number is visible when viewing order details for pickup coordination

constraints: Maintain single-actor backend architecture in backend/main.mo
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity, useActor, main.tsx, and UI components in frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Implementing actual payment processing or Stripe integration
Phone number validation or SMS notifications
Encrypting or securing bank account information beyond basic storage
Multi-currency support or international banking formats
